The Paris 2024 Olympics has puts the spotlight again on the action-packed, gravity-defying, extreme sport of skateboarding, sparking interest in the sport and boosting related businesses. Follow CGTN reporter Xu Yi to experience the thrill of this activity.

title: Paris 2024 reignites skateboarding frenzy in China - CGTN
author: CGTN
description: The Paris 2024 Olympics has puts the spotlight again on the action-packed, gravity-defying, extreme sport of skateboarding, sparking interest in the sport and boosting related businesses. Follow CGTN reporter Xu Yi to experience the thrill of this activity.
